panels.title: Can't Sleep [PRESENT — Kwon's ANCHOR] ★
panels.scene: **11 PM** — Ethan alone on Kwon's mat edge — lights low — phone face-down — Prime group chat muted. Memory cascade begins.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Arc 3 I said it out loud once. MV heard the hour. Tonight my body remembers the rest.*

panels.title: Wrong Setup [FLASH — belt test, dobok only]
panels.scene: Testing gym — Ethan **smallest, youngest** — board **too thick** — parent volunteer holder — Ttong Kim flat: *Punch through. Don't embarrass the school.*

panels.title: Silent Hour [FLASH — belt test montage]
panels.scene: Montage — knuckles pink → clock hands move → **Ttong Kim never adjusts stance, height, or distance** — talks to other parents while Ethan punches wrong angle below center line.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): "Can he stop?" · Ttong Kim (O.S.): *(to someone else)* "Good power. Needs commitment."

panels.title: Self-Fix & Whispers [FLASH — belt test]
panels.scene: Ethan **steps in, rotates hip** — board splits — stumbles — **hand black and blue** — bleacher whispers: *move board closer* · *wrong spot whole hour* · *coach should've said one word*.
panels.dialogue: Father (O.S., hoarse): "He figured it out **himself**. After an hour."

panels.title: Ceremony Hands [FLASH — black belt ceremony]
panels.scene: Instructor cold handshake — Ethan 3rd dan certificate. **Repeul Kim** multicolor at refreshment table — silent.

panels.title: Second Place [REAL #9, #24] [FLASH — test results]
panels.scene: Results posted — Ethan **#1 passing** crossed out — **#2** after bonus — **Ha-eun** smiles at instructor.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Highest score. Second place. Same school.*

panels.title: Parents Proud / Ethan Empty [FLASH — ceremony]
panels.dialogue: Parent: "World champion someday!" · Ethan (internal): *I'm already drowning.*

panels.title: Twenty Minutes [FLASH — belt test clock]
panels.scene: Wall clock — hands jump — same board station — knuckles **pink** — Ethan resets stance.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Other kids went to forms. Sparring. I was still here.*

panels.title: Good Power [FLASH — belt test]
panels.scene: Ethan punches below center line — board flexes — **Ttong Kim** sips coffee — talks to another parent — never looks at Ethan's feet.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (O.S.): "Good power. Needs commitment."

panels.title: Can He Stop [FLASH — belt test bleachers]
panels.scene: Ethan's mother stands — worried — instructor won't meet her eyes.
panels.dialogue: Mother (O.S.): "Can he stop? He already—" · Ttong Kim (O.S.): "He'll break it or he won't. Sit down."

panels.title: Quitting Lesson [FLASH — belt test]
panels.scene: Father argues quietly — Ttong Kim flat — Ethan hears punch rhythm only.
panels.dialogue: Father (O.S.): "He'd pass the test anyway—" · Ttong Kim (O.S.): "Then let him learn what quitting looks like."

panels.title: Pity Worse [FLASH — belt test crowd]
panels.scene: Girl two rows over — always laughed at instructor's jokes — watches Ethan with **pity**, not cruelty.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *That might've been worse.*

panels.title: One Out of Five [FLASH — grading table]
panels.scene: Grader marks sheet — Ethan holds injured hand to chest — Ttong Kim leans in quiet.
panels.dialogue: Grader: "Board break… **one out of five.**" · Ttong Kim: "You made everyone wait. One point." · Ethan: *(small)* "I broke it." · Ttong Kim: "Late and ugly isn't the same as good."

panels.title: Why Didn't Someone Stop [FLASH — bleachers after]
panels.scene: Parents crying — whispers louder now that it's over — Ethan walks to hydration table head down.
panels.dialogue: Parent A (O.S.): "Why didn't someone **stop** him?" · Parent B (O.S.): "He would've passed without it…"

panels.title: Wrong Spot Whole Hour [FLASH — bleacher whispers]
panels.scene: Crowd fragments — fist line · board height · instructor silence.
panels.dialogue: Parent C (O.S.): "Wrong spot the whole time until he **adjusted himself**." · Parent E (O.S.): "Coach should've said **one word**. Adjust. Step. **Anything**."

panels.title: Pass With Zero [FLASH — Ethan internal]
panels.scene: Ethan at hydration table — hand throbbing — hears every whisper.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I would have passed with zero on the board. I know that now. I didn't know it then.*

panels.title: Ha-eun Hugs Arm [FLASH — results posted]
panels.scene: Results board — Ha-eun hugs Ttong's arm — instructor pats her shoulder — Ethan swollen hand in pocket.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "First place — **Ha-eun.** Second — Ethan. Both pass. Be proud."

panels.title: Cold Handshake [FLASH — ceremony detail]
panels.scene: Close on handshake — instructor grip perfunctory — Ethan's hidden hand trembles in sleeve.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Nothing left but fear.*

panels.title: Repeul Kim Scowl [FLASH — refreshment table]
panels.scene: **Repeul Kim** multicolor at refreshment table — mean scowl — says nothing — Ethan passes without eye contact.

panels.title: Camera Smile [FLASH — ceremony photo]
panels.scene: Photo line — Ethan smiles for camera — doesn't reach eyes — parents frame him proud.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Highest score. Second place. Same mat.*
panels.timeline: **FLASH montage** continues from Ch 36 cascade (same insomnia night, no time jump). **Not** chronological — **thematic stack**: money → sidelined → chart → demo → sleepover brag → bonus. **PRESENT snap** at **37.7**.

panels.title: Pay-to-Train Montage [FLASH — dojang, money thread]
panels.scene: Three quick panels — checks · VIP gear · private lessons. **Repeul Kim** may appear at desk edge — silent.

panels.title: Ethan Sidelined [FLASH — dojang mat]
panels.scene: Ethan **wins drill** — Ttong Kim benches him — watches **lesser athlete** promoted / called forward.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Same floor. Different world.*

panels.title: Promotion Wall [REAL #27] [FLASH — dojang wall chart]
panels.scene: Belt chart — **girls' names advance faster** (Ha-eun, others) — boys wait despite higher scores.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Patience, boys. Belt isn't a race." · Ethan (V.O.): *I won every scrimmage last month.*

panels.title: Demo Pick [REAL #9] [FLASH — dojang line drill]
panels.scene: Ethan wins drill — Ttong Kim calls **Ha-eun** (middle of pack) for **demo** instead.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Ha-eun-ah, show them spirit. That's what sponsors like."

panels.title: New Year's Brag [REAL #25] ★ [FLASH — dojang after winter break]
panels.scene: First class after break — **Ha-eun** tells class she **slept at Kim-saab's house** New Year's — Ttong Kim at clipboard **heard everything** — **smiles, doesn't deny**.
panels.dialogue: Ha-eun: "Ask him." · Boy (whisper): "…What?" · Ethan (V.O.): *I didn't know if she was bragging. I knew I wasn't supposed to ask.*

panels.title: Bonus Points [REAL #9, #24] [FLASH — belt test callback]
panels.scene: Cross-ref Arc 3 **28.7** — test sheet — **extra credit / attitude** line — Ha-eun hugs Ttong's arm — Ethan **#2** — bruised hand in pocket.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Extra credit for **school spirit**."

panels.title: Present Snap [PRESENT — Kwon's mats ANCHOR] ★
panels.scene: Cascade ends — Ethan on mat — breathing hard — not crying. **MV** returns for keys — stops.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You shouldn't be alone with that memory." · Ethan: "I thought if I said it once at the tournament, it would leave." · MV: "It doesn't leave. You **learn where it lives** so it doesn't drive." · MV: "At Kwon's, promotion is timestamped. Same criteria. Boys and girls." · Ethan: "She would've had three belts by then." · MV: "And you would've had none of the trust that came with them." · MV: "Go home. Sleep. Tomorrow we train the **second beat**, not the first wound."

panels.title: Checks on Desk [FLASH — pay-to-train detail]
panels.scene: Close on parent check sliding across front desk — **Repeul Kim** stamps receipt — no eye contact.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *They sold access.*

panels.title: VIP Gear Rack [FLASH — pay-to-train]
panels.scene: Ha-eun tries new competition hogus — sponsor logo — Ethan in older gear watches from line.

panels.title: Private Lesson Door [FLASH — pay-to-train]
panels.scene: Back office door closed — muffled instruction — Ethan alone on main mat running forms.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Private lessons. Public silence.*

panels.title: First in Line Drill [FLASH — sidelined setup]
panels.scene: Line drill — Ethan **first** — cleanest kick — board snap clean — Ttong Kim clipboard flat.

panels.title: Benched After Win [FLASH — sidelined payoff]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim points to bench — lesser athlete called forward — Ethan steps back invisible.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "You need humility. Sit."

panels.title: Chart Stickers [FLASH — promotion wall detail]
panels.scene: Close on chart — girls' column stars and dates — Ethan's name eight months unchanged.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I won every scrimmage last month.*

panels.title: Too Long Look [FLASH — demo pick]
panels.scene: Ha-eun smiles at instructor **too long** before demo kick — Ethan in line behind her.

panels.title: She's Kidding [FLASH — New Year's whispers]
panels.scene: Mat gossip ripple — **Girl B** whispers — Ha-eun shrugs — Ttong Kim at door hears all.
panels.dialogue: Girl B (whisper): "She's kidding." · Ha-eun: *(shrugs)* "Ask him."

panels.title: Non-Denial Smile [FLASH — New Year's]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim looks up from clipboard — **doesn't deny** — small smile — back to paperwork.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I wasn't supposed to ask.*

panels.title: Stored Like Board Hour [FLASH — Ethan internal]
panels.scene: Ethan tying belt — hands still — never told parents — never told Logan.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Stored it like the board break hour. I sold silence.*

panels.title: Attitude Line Item [FLASH — bonus detail]
panels.scene: Test sheet close-up — **+attitude / school spirit** line — Ha-eun's total moves above Ethan's.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Extra credit for **school spirit**."

panels.title: MV Footsteps [PRESENT — approach]
panels.scene: **PRESENT** — cascade ends — Ethan breathing on mat — footsteps in hallway — coat rustle.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *step… step…*

panels.title: Gratitude Bow [PRESENT — after MV talk]
panels.scene: After **37.7** dialogue — Ethan stands — bows to MV — not performance — gratitude.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "…Thank you." · MV: "Go home. Sleep."
panels.timeline: **PRESENT** — Ethan returns to **Prime** to pick up forgotten gear — overhears **live** around corner — keeps walking.

panels.title: Around Corner [PRESENT — Prime hallway]
panels.scene: Voices around corner — Ethan frozen mid-step — not a flashback; he is **physically there** picking up gear.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): **"I feel bad for Ethan. You want him to be good at school AND Taekwondo?"** · Ttong Kim (O.S.): *(dismissive laugh)* "Some kids can't handle both."

panels.title: Keeps Walking [PRESENT — Prime hallway exit]
panels.scene: Ethan — no reaction visible — fists in pockets — walks out — face blank.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *School AND taekwondo. They already decided I couldn't.*

panels.title: Forgotten Gear [PRESENT — Prime parking]
panels.scene: Ethan in car — remembers mouthguard in locker — sighs — pulls back into Prime lot.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I told myself I was done with this building.*

panels.title: Empty Hallway [PRESENT — Prime interior]
panels.scene: Fluorescent hallway — trophy cases — muted color — **Blue Lock** pressure — footsteps echo alone.

panels.title: Voices Carry [PRESENT — corner approach]
panels.scene: Ethan slows — gear bag strap tight — voices around corner sharpen — not flashback — **live**.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): "He's such a good kid, though—"

panels.title: School AND Taekwondo [PRESENT — overhear peak]
panels.scene: Tight on Ethan's face — blank — parent voice full sentence lands.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): **"I feel bad for Ethan. You want him to be good at school AND Taekwondo?"**

panels.title: Dismissive Laugh [PRESENT — overhear]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim laugh — short — cruel — Ethan doesn't lean closer — doesn't leave yet.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (O.S.): *(dismissive laugh)* "Some kids can't handle both."

panels.title: Feet Keep Moving [PRESENT — exit walk]
panels.scene: Low angle — Ethan's shoes — one step then another — no stumble — **Solo Leveling** stillness in body.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *They already decided I couldn't.*

panels.title: Locker Grab [PRESENT — silent]
panels.scene: Ethan opens locker — grabs mouthguard — closes — doesn't look at mirror inside door.

panels.title: Car Sit [PRESENT — parking lot]
panels.scene: Driver seat — hands on wheel — engine off — stares at Prime sign.
panels.dialogue: *(none — ten second beat)*

panels.title: Text Logan [PRESENT — phone]
panels.scene: Phone — text to Logan: *Picked up gear. On my way.* — sends — doesn't mention hallway.
panels.dialogue: Logan (reply): "Food when you get here 🍜"

panels.title: Home Mirror [PRESENT — bathroom]
panels.scene: Ethan washes face — mirror — same blank face — water drip.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *School AND taekwondo. Like I was asking for too much.*

panels.title: Next Day Kwon's [PRESENT — normal mat]
panels.scene: Kwon's morning class — Ethan in line — normal — TJ bump fist — no explanation offered.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "You're late." · Ethan: "Traffic." · TJ: "Liar. You're early."

panels.title: Sparring Echo [PRESENT — training trigger]
panels.scene: Ethan sparring — partner's cut kick — flash **one frame** of hallway corner — Ethan blocks late.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Head up. Where'd you go?"

panels.title: Water Break [PRESENT — team]
panels.scene: Team water break — Logan passes bottle — doesn't pry — sits beside Ethan.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "…" · Ethan: "…" · Logan: "Cool."

panels.title: Prime Window Pass [PRESENT — drive home]
panels.scene: Bus/car passes Prime building — Ethan looks once — looks away.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Can't handle both.*

panels.title: Homework Spread [PRESENT — desk night]
panels.scene: Textbooks open — taekwondo notes beside — Ethan studies — proving them wrong silently.

panels.title: Group Chat Muted [PRESENT — phone]
panels.scene: Prime group chat still muted — red dot — Ethan doesn't open — sets phone face-down.

panels.title: MV Clipboard [PRESENT — after class]
panels.scene: MV marks attendance — Ethan present — small check — MV doesn't ask about yesterday.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Good work today." · Ethan: "You too."

panels.title: Mat Edge Night [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: Ethan alone end of practice — sits mat edge — same spot as **36.0** — different building — breathes.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I can handle both. I just can't handle him.*
panels.timeline: **PRESENT** — Kwon's water fountain — **FLASH overlays** as Ethan drinks (memory on present body).

panels.title: Dismissal [PRESENT trigger + FLASH overlay]
panels.scene: **PRESENT** — Ethan at dojang water fountain drinking. **FLASH overlay** — Ttong Kim to another parent at Prime.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (flash): **"I don't think he has the temperament to become a world-class black belt."** · Ethan (V.O.): *Because I wouldn't knock people out for 천 원. Because I was **nice**.*

panels.title: Bounty Memory [REAL #28] ★ [FLASH inset on PRESENT]
panels.scene: Same fountain beat — **[FLASH inset]** staging hall — **1,000 won** — eyes on young Ethan — *too soft* — inset clears — Ethan closes eyes — breathes.

panels.title: Kwon's Fountain [PRESENT — trigger]
panels.scene: **PRESENT** — Kwon's dojang — water fountain — Ethan cups water — cold splash — training just ended.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *gulp… gulp…*

panels.title: Flash Overlay Begins [PRESENT + FLASH]
panels.scene: Water drip — **FLASH overlay** bleeds through — Prime parent night — double exposure on Ethan's face.

panels.title: World-Class Black Belt [FLASH — temperament quote]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim to another parent — gesturing dismissive — Ethan (younger) not in frame — voice only.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (flash): **"I don't think he has the temperament to become a world-class black belt."**

panels.title: Too Nice [PRESENT — internal]
panels.scene: Present Ethan — water still dripping chin — eyes closed — overlay fades half.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Because I wouldn't knock people out for 천 원. Because I was **nice**.*

panels.title: Staging Hall Wide [FLASH — bounty setup]
panels.scene: **[FLASH]** — Prime staging hall — kids in hogus — Ttong Kim on plastic chair **above** them like a general.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Listen. Real champions don't leave it to judges."

panels.title: Thousand Won Coin [FLASH — bounty ★]
panels.scene: Close — **1,000 won** coin between two fingers — room goes quiet — small money — huge rot.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "**One thousand won** — **천 원** — to anyone whose student **knocks out** the other kid. Not wins on points. **Knocks them out.**"

panels.title: Black Belt Finishes [FLASH — bounty philosophy]
panels.scene: Class reaction split — some kids smile — some look at shoes — Ha-eun grins *easy money*.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "**Black belt doesn't mean nice.** Black belt means you **finish** them."

panels.title: Eyes on Ethan [FLASH — too soft]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim's eyes slide to young Ethan — smallest in cluster — silver stripe.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: *(quieter — worse)* "Ethan. **Too soft.** Too **nice** to be a real black belt."

panels.title: Stillness Not Fists [FLASH — body response]
panels.scene: Ethan's hands curl — not into fists — into **stillness** — hogus chest rise slow.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *It wasn't enough for lunch. It was enough to tell me what I was **wrong** for having.*

panels.title: Inset Clears [PRESENT — breathe]
panels.scene: **[FLASH inset clears]** — present fountain — Ethan exhales — shoulders drop one inch.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *exhale…*

panels.title: Walk to Bags [PRESENT — recovery]
panels.scene: Ethan walks to gear bag — towel over shoulder — pace normal — nobody sees the tremor in left hand.

panels.title: TJ Notices [PRESENT — HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: TJ tying shoes — glances up — reads Ethan's face one second — doesn't push.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "You good?" · Ethan: "Yeah. Old Prime air." · TJ: "Wash it off."

panels.title: Logan Bottle Toss [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Logan tosses water bottle — Ethan catches — automatic — small normalcy win.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Catch!" · Ethan: "…Thanks."

panels.title: MV Bounty Contrast [PRESENT — callback inset]
panels.scene: Ethan remembers **MV at tournament** — inset — *We do not chase knockouts* — present Ethan almost smiles.
panels.dialogue: MV (inset): "Black belt means **discipline**, not cruelty." · Logan (inset whisper): "Was that… a thing somewhere?"

panels.title: Gear Zip [PRESENT — ritual]
panels.scene: Ethan zips bag slow — deliberate — each click a reset.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Nice isn't weakness. He just needed it to be.*

panels.title: Exit Door Light [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Dojang door — sunset through glass — Ethan silhouette — team behind laughing.

panels.title: Car Ride Silent [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Logan chatters — Ethan stares window — not unreachable — **processing**.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "—and then the ramen guy said—" · Ethan: "Mm."

panels.title: Night Light Off [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: Ethan's room — light click off — ceiling dark — coin image gone — sleep finally.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Temperament. He meant obedience.*
panels.timeline: **FLASH** — post-tournament parent meeting at Prime. Ethan (younger) watches from back row.

panels.title: Parent Meeting [FLASH — Prime parent night]
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Refs cheated you. Other schools buy belts." · Ethan (V.O.): *Parents nodded. That was the machine.*

panels.title: Finishers Philosophy [REAL #28] [FLASH inset]
panels.scene: Same meeting memory — parent asks if KO is dangerous — **[FLASH inset within flash]** — Ttong Kim: *Only if you're weak. We train finishers. Black belts finish.*

panels.title: Post-Tournament Night [FLASH — meeting setup]
panels.scene: Prime multipurpose room — folding chairs — parents fill rows — tournament banners still up — smell of sweat and coffee.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *They called it a parent meeting. It was a sermon.*

panels.title: Refs Cheated You [FLASH — lies core]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim at podium — projector off — points at empty bracket slide — parents lean in angry.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "Refs cheated you. Other schools **buy** belts. Only Prime is legitimate."

panels.title: Parents Nod [FLASH — machine]
panels.scene: Montage three faces — nodding — one parent already wearing Prime jacket — another taking notes.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Parents nodded. That was the machine.*

panels.title: Back Row Ethan [FLASH — watching]
panels.scene: Younger Ethan in back row — too old for kids' section — too young for parents' — **between worlds**.

panels.title: Only If You're Weak [FLASH — finishers inset]
panels.scene: Parent asks about knockouts — **[FLASH inset within flash]** — Ttong Kim smile wrong.
panels.dialogue: Parent: "Isn't that dangerous for kids?" · Ttong Kim (inset): "Only if you're weak. We train **finishers**. Black belts **finish**."

panels.title: Ethan Copies Anger [FLASH — performance]
panels.scene: Ethan tries nodding with adults — stops mid-nod — feels sick — looks at floor.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I almost believed it because they did.*

panels.title: Prime Logo Banner [FLASH — legitimacy theater]
panels.scene: Wide — **Prime Taekwondo Sports Dynasty** banner behind podium — gold letters — legitimacy as costume.

panels.title: Other Schools Buy Belts [FLASH — scapegoat]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim points at competitor school photo on wall — parents murmur agreement — us vs them.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: "They **buy** promotion. We **earn** it." · Ethan (V.O.): *Ha-eun earned spirit points.*

panels.title: Repeul Kim Pamphlets [FLASH — background]
panels.scene: **Repeul Kim** stacks enrollment pamphlets — multicolor — mean scowl — silent distribution.

panels.title: Walk Home [FLASH — after meeting]
panels.scene: Ethan walks behind parents — three steps back — streetlights — doesn't speak in car.
panels.dialogue: Mother: "We'll appeal the ref call." · Ethan (V.O.): *There was nothing to appeal.*

panels.title: Machine Diagram [FLASH — internal]
panels.scene: Abstract panel — gears labeled *refs* · *other schools* · *loyalty* — Ethan's face reflected in metal.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Lie to parents. Blame outside. Keep paying.*

panels.title: Present Homework [PRESENT — contrast]
panels.scene: **PRESENT** — Ethan at desk — Kwon's tournament rules printout — highlights **points** not KOs — underline MV's note.
panels.dialogue: MV (note): *Win clean. Win twice.*

panels.title: Logan Asks [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Logan in doorway — sees Ethan staring at old Prime photo on phone — doesn't ask which meeting.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Dinner's ready." · Ethan: "Coming."

panels.title: Trash Old Flyer [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan crumples old Prime tournament flyer — tosses bin — doesn't watch it land.

panels.title: Team Film Study [PRESENT — contrast]
panels.scene: Kwon's — MV pauses tape on **legal trunk kick** — team nods — truth as technique.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Two points. No drama. That's the game."

panels.title: Kieryn Deadpan [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Kieryn: "Prime still blaming refs?" · Ethan: "Always." · Kieryn: "Pathetic."

panels.title: Night Phone Scroll [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan almost searches Prime parent reviews — stops — puts phone down — chooses not to feed machine.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I don't need them to admit it. I know.*

panels.title: Eyes Open Dark [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: Dark room — Ethan eyes open — not insomnia cascade — **clarity** — closes eyes on purpose.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Legitimate.*
panels.timeline: **FLASH** — loyalty accusation — **[FLASH inset]** promotion wall (same cascade night).

panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim: **"You skipped tournaments. I don't know how committed you are."** · Ttong Kim (flash inset): "Patience, boys. Belt isn't a race."

panels.title: Tournament Flyer Crossed [FLASH — skipped events]
panels.scene: Prime bulletin board — regional tournament flyer — Ethan's name **not** on travel list — paying students circled.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I skipped one. I had midterms. He skipped me forever.*

panels.title: Bus Leaves Without Him [FLASH — sidelined travel]
panels.scene: Prime van pulls away — Ha-eun waves from window — Ethan on curb with backpack and textbooks.

panels.title: Phone Call [FLASH — commitment setup]
panels.scene: Ethan at home desk — phone rings — instructor ID — answers standing straight like salute.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (O.S.): "Where were you Saturday?"

panels.title: Midterms Don't Matter [FLASH — loyalty trap wide]
panels.scene: Dojang office — Ttong Kim behind desk — Ethan small in chair — trophy wall behind instructor.

panels.title: Eight Months Stripe [FLASH — inset chart]
panels.scene: **[FLASH inset]** — promotion wall — Ethan's stripe unchanged **eight months** — girls' column three new stars.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (inset): "Patience, boys. Belt isn't a race."

panels.title: Paying Students Every Event [FLASH — contrast inset]
panels.scene: **[FLASH inset]** — montage — VIP kids at every tournament photo wall — Ethan absent from all frames.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Committed meant paid. Committed meant quiet.*

panels.title: Corner Confrontation [FLASH — Blue Lock pressure]

panels.scene: Phone buzz — credential search URL — Ethan reads — face unchanged — mall blurs background.
panels.dialogue: Friend: "Don't start a war. I just thought you should know you're **not crazy**."

panels.title: Not Crazy [PRESENT — internal]
panels.scene: Close on Ethan's eyes — years of gaslight — one sentence relief not joy yet.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Not crazy. Just outranked and didn't know.*

panels.title: Friend Leaves [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Friend stands — awkward hug half — leaves — Ethan stays with cold ramen — reads link again.
panels.dialogue: Friend: "See you around. Maybe not at a tournament." · Ethan: "Yeah."

panels.title: Walk to Car [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Parking garage — echo footsteps — phone in hand — doesn't tell team yet — **private verification first**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *If I'm wrong, I don't drag them into it.*

panels.title: Home Desk Open [PRESENT — bridge to Ch 48]
panels.scene: Laptop opens — same URL — bigger screen — fingers hover keyboard — breath steady.

panels.title: Logan Asks [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Logan doorway — sees screen reflection — doesn't read — backs out.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Dinner in ten." · Ethan: "Need twenty." · Logan: "Twenty-five okay."

panels.title: Team Text Ignored [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Team chat pops — Logan meme — Ethan silences notifications — one task tonight.

panels.title: Prime Logo Search [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Search bar — types instructor name — autocomplete suggests — stomach drops before click.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Master. Dynasty. Two words that built a cage.*

panels.title: Registry Loading [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Loading spinner — three seconds feels long — page renders — government plain design — truth doesn't need gold letters.

panels.title: Screenshot Instinct [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan almost screenshots — stops — doesn't want proof to become weapon — wants **understanding**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Not for war. For me.*

panels.title: Night Window Reflection [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Window reflection — older Ethan over younger in glass — both same eyes — chapter bridges to research.

panels.title: Click Enter [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: Finger — enter key — screen floods white — cut to black between chapters.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Show me.*

panels.title: Credential Database
panels.scene: Ethan's room — laptop — official registry.

panels.title: Own Profile Tab
panels.scene: Split screen — Ethan's Kwon's paperwork tab: **Hyun, Ethan — 3rd Dan** — scroll again — same result.

panels.title: Laughter Release ★
panels.scene: Ethan alone — breath hitches — **laughter** — tears different from Arc 3 — can't stop.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: *(to empty room)* **"I'm third dan. I outrank him."**

panels.title: Search Typing [PRESENT — research]
panels.scene: Fingers type — **Kim, Ttong** — autofill — official national registry — no Prime banner — just data.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Second dan. Instructor. Not master.*

panels.title: Screen Flood [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Results render — plain text row — credentials colder than any trophy case.

panels.title: Stare [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan stares — doesn't blink — ten seconds — room silent — clock ticks.
panels.dialogue: *(none — held beat)*

panels.title: Scroll Again [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Scroll wheel — same result — refresh — same — truth doesn't glitch.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Not a mistake. A title.*

panels.title: Own Tab Open [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Second tab — Kwon's paperwork scan — MV filed copy — Ethan profile.

panels.title: Split Screen Compare [PRESENT — 48.2 echo]
panels.scene: Split monitor — **2nd Dan** left — **3rd Dan** right — numbers absurd next to memory of *too soft*.

panels.title: Breath Hitch [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Chest — breath hitch — not sob — laugh trying to escape — hand over mouth — disbelief.

panels.title: Laughter Starts [PRESENT — catharsis ★]
panels.scene: Shoulders shake — silent first — then sound — tears different from Arc 3 — **relief** not grief.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: *(choked)* "…no."

panels.title: Can't Stop [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Floor — back against bed — laptop on thighs — laughs until stomach hurts — wipes face — laughs again.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: *(to empty room)* **"I'm third dan. I outrank him."**

panels.title: Logan Hears [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Through door — Logan pauses — listens — doesn't knock — smiles — walks away barefoot quiet.
panels.dialogue: Logan (V.O.): *That's a good sound.*

panels.title: Imposter Context [PRESENT — internal]
panels.scene: Montage inset three frames — *too soft* · *not committed* · *second place* — laughter over them — context not revenge.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Not excuse. **Context**.*

panels.title: Close Laptop [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Laptop click shut — breath finally even — face flushed — eyes bright — new kind of tired.

panels.title: Mirror Grin [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Bathroom mirror — accidental grin — catches self — doesn't erase it fast — lets it stay.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "Third dan."

panels.title: Sleep Finally [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Bed — still smiling small — phone face-down — threats forgotten one night — earned rest.

panels.title: Morning Dojang [PRESENT — bridge Ch 49]
panels.scene: Ethan walks in — secret in chest — TJ waves — Ethan waves — almost skips — doesn't — dignity.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "You're weirdly awake." · Ethan: "Good sleep."

panels.title: Mat Touch [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan touches mat edge — same as **36.0** — different weight in body — bows alone before class.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Paperwork and pain. Both real. One I can close.*

panels.title: Whisper Decision [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: Ethan spots TJ — decision — tell one person first — pulls him aside — chapter hands to comedy.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "TJ. I need to tell you something stupid." · TJ: "Stupid how?"

panels.title: Whisper to TJ
panels.scene: Ethan pulls TJ aside on mat — whisper — TJ processing.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Wait. Wait wait wait—" · TJ: *(drops to mat wheezing)* "He called **you** too soft?!"

panels.title: Team Audit
panels.scene: Whole team hears — Logan wide-eyed — Kieryn deadpan — Kian reconsidering.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "That explains the gear obsession." · Kian: "Actually… yeah." · Logan: "So Ethan could've… ordered him around?" · Ethan: "Technically on paper—" · MV: *(door)* "If you're done auditing the universe, water break."

panels.title: Ariana Almost Smiles
panels.scene: Ariana corner of mouth — returns to stretching — nobody comments.

panels.title: Stupid How [PRESENT — comedy setup]
panels.scene: TJ crosses arms — tries to look serious — failing — Ethan whispering rank facts like contraband.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Stupid how?" · Ethan: "Stupid true."

panels.title: Processing Face [PRESENT]
panels.scene: TJ blink — slow — second blink faster — brain loading — mouth opens — closes — opens.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Wait."

panels.title: Wait Wait Wait [PRESENT]
panels.scene: TJ hand up — stop gesture — Ethan nodding — both crouched by mat edge like conspirators.
panels.dialogue: TJ: **"Wait. Wait wait wait—"**

panels.title: Too Soft Callback [PRESENT — punchline ★]
panels.scene: TJ drops to mat — **wheezing laugh** — hand on chest — teammates turn — alarm then curiosity.
panels.dialogue: TJ: *(wheezing)* "He called **you** too soft?!"

panels.title: Whole Team Turns [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Six heads pivot — Logan speed-walks — Kieryn already deadpan ready — Kian jogging over.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "WHAT happened—" · Kieryn: "Don't yell yet." · Logan: "I CAN'T HELP IT."

panels.title: Ethan Explains [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan explains — flat delivery — funnier for it — 2nd vs 3rd — master title — gesturing small.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "He's **second dan**. Instructor level. I'm **third**. On paper I could've… never mind."

panels.title: Gear Obsession [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Kieryn nod — slow — devastating deadpan — team erupts second wave.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: **"That explains the gear obsession."**

panels.title: Kian Tracks [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Kian arms crossed — denial face — surrender face — same beat comedy gold.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Impossible." · *(beat)* · Kian: "Actually… yeah."

panels.title: Order Him Around [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Logan eyes wide — calculations wrong — delight — Ethan embarrassed grin now.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "So Ethan could've… **ordered him around**?" · Ethan: "Technically on paper—"

panels.title: MV Door [PRESENT — comedy cut]
panels.scene: MV office door — arms crossed — team scattered mid-laugh — frozen like caught kids.
panels.dialogue: MV: **"If you're done auditing the universe, water break. Then footwork."**

panels.title: Water Break Scramble [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Chaos — water bottles — Logan trips — TJ still wheezing — Kieryn pours water dignified — Kian high-fives Ethan too hard.

panels.title: Still Giggling Stretch [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Stretching line — shoulders still shaking — MV counts — nobody counts with him — too funny.
panels.dialogue: MV: "…Ten. Sure. Ten."

panels.title: Ariana Corner Mouth [PRESENT — 49.3 echo]
panels.scene: Ariana corner of mouth — **almost** smile — returns to hamstring stretch — nobody comments — she keeps the almost.

panels.title: Imposter Syndrome Named [PRESENT — theme]
panels.scene: Ethan sits — team around — quieter — truth under comedy.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I thought I was the fraud." · TJ: "He was selling a title." · Kieryn: "Different fraud."

panels.title: Not Revenge [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan shakes head — no war — context — MV watching from corner — proud not shown.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I'm not starting anything. I just… needed to know." · MV: *(small nod off-panel)*

panels.title: Footwork After [PRESENT — ACTION comedy]
panels.scene: Footwork drill — everyone too loose — MV whistle — they snap — laughter between reps — **Haikyuu** joy training.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Laugh on your own time. Move on mine." · Logan: "Yes coach!" *(still grinning)*

panels.title: Exit High-Five Line [PRESENT — chapter end]
panels.scene: End practice — high-five line — even Ariana taps Ethan's palm — light — comedy chapter exhale.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Third dan energy!" · Ethan: "Stop—" · All: "THIRD DAN!"

panels.title: MV Wisdom
panels.scene: MV and Ethan alone after class.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You verified rank. Good. Now don't confuse paperwork with permission to be cruel." · MV: **"Rank is paperwork. Character is what you do next."** · Ethan: "He still messaged my grandmother's hospital week." · MV: "Then you delete. You train. You don't become him to beat him."

panels.title: Late Night Mat ★
panels.scene: Lights low — roundhouse into shield — again — last threatening voicemail **delete** — **first smile while kicking** in series.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Third dan. Still scared sometimes. Not of his belt anymore.*

panels.title: After Class Empty [PRESENT — MV talk setup]
panels.scene: Team files out — Logan last — looks back — MV waves him on — Ethan alone with coach — mats quiet.
panels.dialogue: Logan: *(mouthed)* "You good?" · Ethan: *(nod)*

panels.title: Paperwork Not Permission [PRESENT — MV wisdom]
panels.scene: MV sits on chair — not throne — Ethan stands — respectful — evening light long.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You verified rank. Good. Now don't confuse paperwork with permission to be cruel."

panels.title: I'm Not [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan quick — almost offended — MV raises hand — stop — gentler.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I'm not—" · MV: "I know."

panels.title: Rank Is Paperwork [PRESENT — ★]
panels.scene: Close two-shot — MV steady — Ethan listening — quote lands clean.
panels.dialogue: MV: **"Rank is paperwork. Character is what you do next."**

panels.title: Hospital Week [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan's jaw — memory — doesn't look away from MV — honest.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "He still messaged my grandmother's hospital week."

panels.title: Delete Train Don't Become [PRESENT]
panels.scene: MV stands — same height now — not towering — peer in craft.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Then you **delete**. You train. You don't become him to beat him."

panels.title: Ethan Nods [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Single nod — different from Prime surrender nods — **chosen**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "I won't."

panels.title: Lights Low [PRESENT — night mat setup]
panels.scene: 10 PM — Ethan alone — turns off half the lights — dojang blue — last voicemail notification glows.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *One left. Same voice. Same lie.*

panels.title: Voicemail Play [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Phone — play — Ttong Kim voice thinner through speaker — Ethan listens whole thing this time — no flinch.
panels.dialogue: Ttong Kim (V.O.): "…make it worse…"

panels.title: Delete [PRESENT — ★]
panels.scene: Thumb — delete — confirm — notification gone — exhale — **first smile while holding phone**.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *swipe… gone.*

panels.title: Shield Setup [PRESENT — ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan sets kicking shield on stand — alone — mouthguard in — wraps wrists — ritual clean.

panels.title: Roundhouse One [PRESENT — ACTION]
panels.scene: **Roundhouse** to shield — *TAK* — hip turns full — form Kwon's not Prime — electronic gear memory absent — pure technique.
panels.dialogue: *(SFX)* *TAK*

panels.title: Roundhouse Two [PRESENT — ACTION]
panels.scene: Again — faster — smile twitch corner mouth — not performance — **private**.

panels.title: Roundhouse Three [PRESENT — ACTION ★]
panels.scene: Third — **first smile while kicking** in series — eyes forward — guard up — joy and fight same face.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Third dan. Still scared sometimes. Not of his belt anymore.*

panels.title: Back Kick [PRESENT — ACTION]
panels.scene: **Back kick** to shield — PCA pattern — Ethan control not hunter — MV's teaching embodied — *BEEP* imagined not needed.

panels.title: Sweat Drip [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan stops — hands on knees — sweat floor drip — phone dark — dojang silent — peace not victory.

panels.title: Mat Bow [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Ethan bows to empty mat — to past self — to team not present — gratitude without audience.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Character is what you do next.*

panels.title: Arc End Wide [PRESENT — ★ chapter end]
panels.scene: Wide exterior — Kwon's sign glow — one figure moving inside — city dark — Arc 4 closes — Arc 5 ahead.
panels.dialogue: *(caption)* *The shadow still exists. It doesn't drive.*
